intro:
Haldwani is the largest city in the Kumaon division of Uttarakhand and a major commercial gateway to the Kumaon hills, serving as a supply hub for the entire region. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 280+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Haldwani.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Haldwani's position at the foothills of the Himalayas requires vendors experienced in both plains transportation and hilly-route logistics. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Haldwani. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Haldwani?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹4,500. 2 BHK typically ₹7,000 – ₹13,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Haldwani?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Haldwani and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
